lessons.title: 第一课：自我介绍
lessons.description: 学习如何进行基本的自我介绍、问好并结交新朋友。

lines.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo! Wǒ de míngzi jiào Dàwèi.
lines.translation: Hello! My name is David.

lines.character: 你好，大卫！我是你的新中文老师，我姓王。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo, Dàwèi! Wǒ shì nǐ de xīn Zhōngwén lǎoshī, wǒ xìng Wáng.
lines.translation: Hello, David! I am your new Chinese teacher, my surname is Wang.

lines.pinyin: Hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ, Wáng lǎoshī!
lines.translation: Very glad to meet you, Teacher Wang!

lines.character: 欢迎你来到中国，我们可以成为好朋友！
lines.pinyin: Huānyíng nǐ lái dào Zhōngguó, wǒmen kěyǐ chéngwéi hǎo péngyou!
lines.translation: Welcome to China! We can become good friends!

vocab.examplePy: Nǐhǎo! Hěn gāoxìng jiàndào nǐ.
vocab.exampleEn: Hello! Very happy to see you.

vocab.examplePy: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
vocab.exampleEn: What is your name?

vocab.exampleCh: 王老师是我们的新中文老师。
vocab.examplePy: Wáng lǎoshī shì wǒmen de xīn Zhōngwén lǎoshī.
vocab.exampleEn: Teacher Wang is our new Chinese teacher.

vocab.examplePy: Rènshi nǐ wǒ hěn gāoxìng.
vocab.exampleEn: Meeting you makes me very happy.

vocab.examplePy: Huānyíng nǐmen lái dào Zhōngguó!
vocab.exampleEn: Welcome you all to China!

vocab.examplePy: Dàwèi shì wǒ de hǎo péngyou.
vocab.exampleEn: David is my good friend.

customChoices.questionText: 请问汉字 “你好” 的正确拼音是什么？
生词 “名字” 的英文意思是什么？
请问汉字 “老师” 的正确拼音是什么？

customBlanks.hintEn: Hello! Very happy to see you.

customBlanks.sentenceWithBlank: 王________是我们的新中文老师。
customBlanks.hintEn: Teacher Wang is our new Chinese teacher.

customDialogues.correctAnswerCharacter: 你好，大卫！我是你的新中文老师，我姓王。
options: 你好，大卫！我是你的新中文老师，我姓王。

customDialogues.previousLineCharacter: 你好，大卫！我是你的新中文老师，我姓王。

customDialogues.correctAnswerCharacter: 欢迎你来到中国，我们可以成为好朋友！
options: 欢迎你来到中国，我们可以成为好朋友！

lessons.title: 第二课：在饭店点菜
lessons.description: 到餐厅点餐，学习常用菜肴名称和基础结账对话。

lines.character: 服务员，请给我看一个菜单。
lines.pinyin: Fúwùyuán, qǐng gěi wǒ kàn yí gè càidān.
lines.translation: Waiter, please show me a menu.

lines.character: 好的，先生。我们这儿的饺子特别好吃！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, xiānsheng. Wǒmen zhèr de jiǎozi tèbié hǎochī!
lines.translation: Okay, sir. Our dumplings here are extremely delicious!

lines.character: 太棒了，那我要一盘饺子，还有一杯热咖啡。
lines.pinyin: Tài bàng le, nà wǒ yào yì pán jiǎozi, hái yǒu yì bēi rè kāfēi.
lines.translation: Great! Then I'll have a plate of dumplings, and a cup of hot coffee.

lines.character: 请慢用。需要买单的时候叫我。
lines.pinyin: Qǐng màn yòng. Xūyào mǎidān de shíhou jiào wǒ.
lines.translation: Please enjoy. Call me when you need to pay the bill.

vocab.examplePy: Fúwùyuán, wǒmen yào mǎidān.
vocab.exampleEn: Waiter, we would like to pay.

vocab.exampleCh: 这家的菜单有英文翻译。
vocab.examplePy: Zhè jiā de càidān yǒu Yīngwén fānyì.
vocab.exampleEn: This restaurant's menu has English translations.

vocab.examplePy: Zhōngguórén zài Chūnjié chī jiǎozi.
vocab.exampleEn: Chinese people eat dumplings during the Spring Festival.

vocab.exampleCh: 妈妈做的饺子太好吃了。
vocab.examplePy: Māma zuò de jiǎozi tài hǎochī le.
vocab.exampleEn: The dumplings my mother made are so delicious.

vocab.examplePy: Wǒ bù xǐhuan hē kǔ kāfēi.
vocab.exampleEn: I do not like drinking bitter coffee.

vocab.exampleCh: 请问我们可以去那里买单吗？
vocab.examplePy: Qǐngwèn wǒmen kěyǐ qù nàlǐ mǎidān ma?
vocab.exampleEn: Excuse me, can we go there to pay the bill?

lessons.title: 第四课：她是我的汉语老师
lessons.pinyinTitle: Dì-sì Kè: Tā shì wǒ de Hànyǔ lǎoshī
lessons.description: 学习第三人称、国籍称呼、“谁”以及“的”、“呢”等中文核心词汇与句型用法。

lines.pinyin: Tā shì shéi?
lines.translation: Who is she?

lines.character: 她是我的汉语老师，她叫李月。
lines.pinyin: Tā shì wǒ de Hànyǔ lǎoshī, tā jiào Lǐ Yuè.
lines.translation: She is my Chinese teacher. Her name is Li Yue.

lines.pinyin: Nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?
lines.translation: Which country are you from?

lines.pinyin: Wǒ shì Měiguó rén. Nǐ ne?
lines.translation: I'm from the United States. What about you?

lines.pinyin: Wǒ shì Zhōngguó rén.
lines.translation: I'm Chinese.

lines.pinyin: Tā shì shéi?
lines.translation: Who is he?

lines.pinyin: Tā shì wǒ tóngxué.
lines.translation: He is my classmate.

lines.pinyin: Tā ne? Tā shì nǐ tóngxué ma?
lines.translation: What about her? Is she your classmate?

lines.character: 她不是我同学，她是我的朋友。
lines.pinyin: Tā bú shì wǒ tóngxué, tā shì wǒ de péngyou.
lines.translation: No, she isn't. She is my friend.

vocab.examplePy: Tā shì Lǐ Yuè.
vocab.exampleEn: She is Li Yue.

vocab.examplePy: Tā shì shéi?
vocab.exampleEn: Who is she?

vocab.translation: used after an attribute to indicate possession
vocab.examplePy: Tā shì wǒ de lǎoshī.
vocab.exampleEn: She is my teacher.

vocab.exampleCh: 我们的汉语老师很和蔼。
vocab.examplePy: Wǒmen de Hànyǔ lǎoshī hěn hé'ǎi.
vocab.exampleEn: Our Chinese teacher is very kind.

vocab.examplePy: Nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?
vocab.exampleEn: Which country are you from?

vocab.exampleCh: 中国是一个美丽的国家。
vocab.examplePy: Zhōngguó shì yí gè měilì de guójiā.
vocab.exampleEn: China is a beautiful country.

vocab.translation: used at the end of a question for elliptical questions
vocab.examplePy: Wǒ shì xuésheng, nǐ ne?
vocab.exampleEn: I am a student, what about you?

vocab.examplePy: Tā shì wǒ tóngwū.
vocab.exampleEn: He is my roommate.

vocab.examplePy: Tā shì wǒ tóngxué.
vocab.exampleEn: He is my classmate.

vocab.examplePy: Tā shì wǒ de hǎo péngyou.
vocab.exampleEn: She is my good friend.

lessons.title: 第五课：她女儿今年二十岁
lessons.pinyinTitle: Dì-wǔ Kè: Tā nǚ'ér jīnnián èrshí suì
lessons.description: 学习如何用中文问及表达家属成员、年龄及常用疑问词“几”与“多”。

lines.pinyin: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
lines.translation: How many people are there in your family?

lines.pinyin: Wǒ jiā yǒu sān kǒu rén.
lines.translation: There are three people in my family.

lines.pinyin: Nǐ nǚ'ér jǐ suì le?
lines.translation: How old is your daughter?

lines.pinyin: Tā jīnnián sì suì le.
lines.translation: She is four years old this year.

lines.pinyin: Lǐ lǎoshī duō dà le?
lines.translation: How old is Professor Li?

lines.pinyin: Tā jīnnián wǔshí suì le.
lines.translation: She is 50 years old this year.

lines.pinyin: Tā nǚ'ér ne?
lines.translation: What about her daughter?

lines.pinyin: Tā nǚ'ér jīnnián èrshí suì.
lines.translation: Her daughter is 20 years old this year.

vocab.examplePy: Nǐ jiā zhù zài nǎlǐ?
vocab.exampleEn: Where does your family live?

vocab.examplePy: Wǒ jiā yǒu yì zhī xiǎo gǒu.
vocab.exampleEn: My home has a little dog.

vocab.translation: measure word for members of families
vocab.examplePy: Nǐ jiā yǒu jǐ kǒu rén?
vocab.exampleEn: How many people are there in your family?

vocab.examplePy: Tā shì wǒ nǚ'ér.
vocab.exampleEn: She is my daughter.

vocab.examplePy: Nǐ yǒu jǐ běn shū?
vocab.exampleEn: How many books do you have?

vocab.examplePy: Wǒ jīnnián èrshí suì.
vocab.exampleEn: I am twenty years old this year.

vocab.translation: used at the end of or in the middle of a sentence to indicate change
vocab.examplePy: Tā xiànzài dāng lǎoshī le.
vocab.exampleEn: He has become a teacher now.

vocab.exampleCh: 今年北京的天气很暖和。
vocab.examplePy: Jīnnián Běijīng de tiānqì hěn nuǎnhuo.
vocab.exampleEn: The weather in Beijing is very warm this year.

vocab.examplePy: Tā yǒu duō gāo?
vocab.exampleEn: How tall is he?

vocab.examplePy: Lǐ lǎoshī duō dà le?
vocab.exampleEn: How old is Professor Li?

customChoices.questionText: 请问汉字 “家” 的正确拼音是什么？
生词 “有” 的英文意思是什么？
options: measure word for members of families

customChoices.questionText: 请问汉字 “口” 的正确拼音是什么？

customBlanks.hintEn: My home has a little dog.
How many people are there in your family?

lessons.title: 第六课：《小狐狸与星星》
lessons.description: 通过精读小狐狸阿星寻找最亮星星的睡前故事，学习描写自然、愿望、相信等常用中文生词与表达方式。

lines.character: 晚上，月亮挂在天空上。 小狐狸阿星在森林里散步。 忽然，他看到一条发光的小路。
lines.pinyin: Wǎnshàng, yuèliàng guà zài tiānkōng shàng. Xiǎo húli Āxīng zài sēnlín lǐ sànbù. Hūrán, tā kàndào yītiáo fāguāng de xiǎolù.
lines.translation: At night, the moon was hanging in the sky. The little fox, Axing, was taking a walk in the forest. Suddenly, he saw a glowing path.

lines.character: 阿星很好奇，慢慢走上那条路。 路的最后面，有一棵金色的大树。 树下坐着一只戴眼镜的猫头鹰。
lines.pinyin: Āxīng hěn hàoqí, mànmàn zǒu shàng nà tiáo lù. Lù de zuìhòumiàn, yǒu yī kē jīnsè de dà shù. Shù xià zuòzhe yī zhǐ dài yǎnjìng de māotóuyīng.
lines.translation: Axing was very curious and slowly walked along that path. At the very end of the path, there was a golden tree. Under the tree sat an owl wearing glasses.

lines.character: 猫头鹰说：“欢迎来到月亮森林！” “每只动物都有一个愿望，你想要什么？” 阿星想了想，说：“我想要找到最亮的星星”
lines.pinyin: Māotóuyīng shuō: “Huānyíng lái dào yuèliàng sēnlín!” “Měi zhǐ dòngwù dōu yǒu yí gè yuànwàng, nǐ xiǎng yào shénme?” Āxīng xiǎngle xiǎng, shuō: “Wǒ xiǎng yào zhǎodào zuì liàng de xīngxing”
lines.translation: The owl said: 'Welcome to the Moon Forest! Every animal has a wish, what do you want?' Axing thought for a moment and said: 'I want to find the brightest star.'

lines.character: 猫头鹰拿出一根金色的羽毛，递给阿星，说：“这是一根星光羽毛，它可以帮你找到那颗最亮的星星。” 阿星：“真的可以吗？谢谢你！” 猫头鹰：“当然。但你要相信自己的心”
lines.pinyin: Māotóuyīng ná chū yì gēn jīnsè de yǔmáo, dì gěi Āxīng, shuō: “Zhè shì yì gēn xīngguāng yǔmáo, tā kěyǐ bāng nǐ zhǎodào nà kē zuì liàng de xīngxing.” Āxīng: “Zhēn de kěyǐ ma? Xièxie nǐ!” Māotóuyīng: “Dāngrán. Dàn nǐ yào xiāngxìn zìjǐ de xīn”
lines.translation: The owl took out a golden feather, handed it to Axing, and said: 'This is a starlight feather, it can help you find that brightest star.' Axing: 'Can it really? Thank you!' Owl: 'Of course. But you must believe in your own heart.'

lines.character: 阿星拿着羽毛跑到山顶。天空上闪着很多星星。 阿星：“星星们，我来了！” （羽毛突然发出金色的光，一颗星星来到了阿星的前面）
lines.pinyin: Āxīng názhe yǔmáo pǎo dào shāndǐng. Tiānkōng shang shǎnzhe hěnduō xīngxing. Āxīng: “Xīngxingmen, wǒ lái le!” (Yǔmáo tūrán fāchū jīnsè de guāng, yì kē xīngxing lái dàole Āxīng de qiánmiàn)
lines.translation: Axing ran to the mountain top holding the feather. Many stars were sparkling in the sky. Axing: 'Stars, here I come!' (The feather suddenly emitted a golden light, and a star came in front of Axing.)

lines.character: 阿星：“哇～ 你是最亮的星星吗？” 星星：“是啊！你终于找到我了”
lines.pinyin: Āxīng: “Wa~ Nǐ shì zuì liàng de xīngxing ma?” Xīngxing: “Shì a! Nǐ zhōngyú zhǎodào wǒ le”
lines.translation: Axing: 'Wow~ Are you the brightest star?' Star: 'Yes! You finally found me.'

lines.character: 阿星对星星说：“谢谢你，星星” 星星：（笑着）“不客气，记得让你的心，也一直亮着哦。” 阿星：“我会的” 最后，星星笑着飞回天空。从那天起，森林变得更亮了。
lines.pinyin: Āxīng duì xīngxing shuō: “Xièxie nǐ, xīngxing” Xīngxing: (xiàozhe) “Bú kèqi, jìdé ràng nǐ de xīn, yě yīzhí liàngzhe o.” Āxīng: “Wǒ huì de” Zuìhòu, xīngxing xiàozhe fēi huí tiānkōng. Cóng nà tiān qǐ, sēnlín biànde gèng liàng le.
lines.translation: Axing said to the star: 'Thank you, star'. Star (smiling): 'You are welcome, remember to make your heart keep shining too.' Axing: 'I will'. Finally, the star flew back to the sky with a smile. From that day on, the forest became brighter.

vocab.exampleCh: 小狐狸阿星在森林里散步。
vocab.examplePy: Xiǎo húli Āxīng zài sēnlín lǐ sànbù.
vocab.exampleEn: The little fox Axing was taking a walk in the forest.

vocab.exampleCh: 树下坐着一只戴眼镜的猫头鹰。
vocab.examplePy: Shù xià zuòzhe yī zhǐ dài yǎnjìng de māotóuyīng.
vocab.exampleEn: An owl wearing glasses was sitting under the tree.

vocab.exampleCh: 月亮森林是一个美丽的地方。
vocab.examplePy: Yuèliang sēnlín shì yí gè měilì de dìfang.
vocab.exampleEn: The moon forest is a beautiful place.

vocab.examplePy: Wǎnshàng, yuèliàng guà zài tiānkōng shàng.
vocab.exampleEn: At night, the moon was hanging in the sky.

vocab.examplePy: Zhè shì yì gēn jīnsè de yǔmáo.
vocab.exampleEn: This is a golden feather.

vocab.exampleCh: 阿星拿着羽毛跑到山顶。
vocab.examplePy: Āxīng názhe yǔmáo pǎo dào shāndǐng.
vocab.exampleEn: Axing ran to the mountain top holding the feather.

vocab.exampleCh: 我们每天晚上在森林里散步。
vocab.examplePy: Wǒmen měitiān wǎnshàng zài sēnlín lǐ sànbù.
vocab.exampleEn: We take a walk in the forest every evening.

vocab.exampleCh: 他看到一条发光的小路。
vocab.examplePy: Tā kàndào yītiáo fāguāng de xiǎolù.
vocab.exampleEn: He saw a glowing path.

vocab.exampleCh: 月亮挂在深蓝色的天空上。
vocab.examplePy: Yuèliang guà zài shēnlán sè de tiānkōng shang.
vocab.exampleEn: The moon hangs in the deep blue sky.

vocab.exampleCh: 阿星对这条小路很好奇。
vocab.examplePy: Āxīng duì zhè tiáo lù hěn hàoqí.
vocab.exampleEn: Axing was very curious about this path.

vocab.examplePy: Nǐ yào xiāngxìn zìjǐ de xīn.
vocab.exampleEn: You must believe in your own heart.

vocab.examplePy: Wǒ xiǎng zhǎodào zuì liàng de xīngxing.
vocab.exampleEn: I want to find the brightest star.

vocab.exampleCh: 每只动物都有一个愿望。
vocab.examplePy: Měi zhǐ dòngwù dōu yǒu yí gè yuànwàng.
vocab.exampleEn: Every animal has a wish.

vocab.examplePy: Jīnwǎn de xīngxing tèbié liàng.
vocab.exampleEn: The stars tonight are exceptionally bright.

vocab.examplePy: Jìdé xiě nǐ de Zhōngwén zuòyè.
vocab.exampleEn: Remember to write your Chinese homework.

vocab.exampleCh: 天空上有许多美丽的星星。
vocab.examplePy: Tiānkōng shang yǒu xǔduō měilì de xīngxing.
vocab.exampleEn: There are many beautiful stars in the sky.

vocab.examplePy: Tiānkōng shang shǎnzhe hěnduō xīngxing.
vocab.exampleEn: Many stars are sparkling in the sky.

vocab.examplePy: Nǐ zhōngyú zhǎodào wǒ le.
vocab.exampleEn: You've finally found me.
